snippet.description:
A patient is injured by a radiation therapy machine, but the machine reports that nothing happened.
This Cascade Effects video follows the Therac-25 accidents through the software race condition, missing hardware interlocks, operator warnings, and institutional trust that let the same failure repeat.

Chapters:
00:00 Patient or Machine
01:15 The Narrow Margin
02:47 The Safety Net Removed
04:29 The Hidden State
06:24 How Trust Repeats
09:14 The Pattern Repeats
12:00 The Burden of Proof
15:04 Trust Is Not Safety

References:
Nancy Leveson and Clark Turner, An Investigation of the Therac-25 Accidents
Computing Cases, Therac-25 case materials and operator-interface notes

#Therac25 #SoftwareSafety #MedicalDevices
